channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
item.description: A sharp rise in the yen has left bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies underperforming in yen terms compared with their dollar-based trading pairs.

item.title: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
item.description: Zcash’s next upgrade will replace the once-compromised Orchard pool and may offer clues about whether counterfeit tokens were created via a recent bug.

item.title: Bitcoin zips higher to nearly $64,000 as chip rally and yen strength drive gains
item.description: Bitcoin is up 4.2% over seven days that contained an oil shock, a bond selloff and two rounds of U.S. strikes on Iran.

item.title: Hackers tried to backdoor Injective npm package to steal wallet keys
item.description: The incident is significant for developers and applications that handle Injective wallet workflows, Socket researchers said.

item.title: DeFi may be ‘quietly re-rating’ given outperformance against Bitcoin: Bitwise
item.description: “DeFi usually swings much harder than Bitcoin, so holding up this well is unusual,” says Bitwise, as DeFi tokens have outperformed Bitcoin.

item.title: New Hampshire snuffs out trailblazing state-government bitcoin bond effort
item.description: At its last stage for government approval, the state's executive council rejected the bond project 3-2.

item.title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
item.description: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

item.title: Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31
item.description: The soon-to-be former chief legal officer did not announce the details of his next move but said that he would continue working with the Board of Coinbase National Trust Company.

item.title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
item.description: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.

item.title: Grayscale's CFO exits after 7 years with crypto asset manager
item.description: Edward McGee stepped down after seven years, months after distribution chief John Hoffman left for Ondo Finance.

item.title: Perplexity Fine-Tuned a Chinese AI Model to Match Claude Opus 4.8 at One-Third the Cost
item.description: The company's post-trained GLM 5.2 preview pairs a cheaper open-source base with a frontier advisor—and it's already live in production.

item.title: With SEC fight over, Coinbase's top legal exec Grewal moves on, and others reassigned
item.description: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal will depart the exchange, though he'll continue as an adviser, he said Thursday.

item.title: Arbitrum jumps 19% benefitting from Robinhood's $568 million onchain trading frenzy
item.description: The brokerage's new blockchain is off to a fast start, with memecoin trading boosting activity and revenue flowing back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.

item.title: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
item.description: Former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke will have the power to appoint Anthropic board members as part of company's Long-Term Benefit Trust.

item.title: Bitdeer stock jumps 14% as company expands US mining hardware production
item.description: Bitdeer shares rallied after the company announced a $36 million Nevada manufacturing facility that will produce its SEALMINER Bitcoin mining machines and expand its hardware business.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: White House says it received no Democratic response related to SEC, CFTC vacancies
item.description: Both US financial regulators are understaffed at the leadership level and lacking Democratic commissioners, with no announcement from President Donald Trump on filling the roles.

item.title: NEW: Public companies have bought 110,000 Bitcoin in Q2 2026 👀 Public companies now hold over 1.26 million BTC, which is more than 6% of Bitcoin’s total supply 🚀 - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0zelEzODBqRE9nOURYdHFWMjdwSDNsNzVkZnZEQU9yc2NVcGlqUVBHTndjeWpfLS1IT21PZWdvNE1GaGxwUHg1TmF1cUh1LWpKaUVpUm02UUhsUnhEV281Z05zZFZsMW8?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Public companies have …

item.title: Phantom, Hyperliquid ask CFTC to modernize rules for onchain derivatives
item.description: The companies urged the regulator to exempt blockchain developers and non-custodial wallet providers from rules designed for traditional financial intermediaries.

item.title: Newest version of crypto Clarity Act may drop as soon as next week, sources say
item.description: After a long stretch without breakthroughs in the crypto market structure bill, insiders say a new draft may emerge in a final push for late-July action — though it still lacks bipartisan buy-in.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
item.description: Ethereum researchers are using AI agents to hunt for vulnerabilities, shifting security work from finding bugs to proving which ones are real.

item.title: Gary Cardone: "I think I will see $40k #bitcoin this year. In fact I think I'll see $40k before November." "I also would like to see that. Because I like price capitulation over time capitulation." - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE51T1JuYThTV2xoNWJlRlI5LS1PcmVjazJkTEphbXhqcEx1UGZHTEFKUjlxZThoN0J3WUl0R05xNDZlb21XWWhGVDF2WVI4cDZpX0R4YTQ4eGU2VHJxelVoODlFVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Gary Cardone: "I think I will se…

item.title: Billions flowing out of bitcoin ETFs and private credit funds suggest rising market risks
item.description: Redemption requests in the $2 trillion private credit market surged to $15.6 billion in the second quarter, dwarfing bitcoin ETF outflows.

item.title: Former Meta Engineer Explains Why He Sold All His Bitcoin Former Meta engineer @techleadhd has resurfaced after a period of silence, admitting he has liquidated his entire Bitcoin position. He argues that Bitcoin's core problem is that "attention is liquidity" - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBUdWtfMkxGNU4wSmZoQ2R4MTQyZ0NzUGxjNjhmUW1MT1FubU9ZTmN5bUtqR1RKaUdEbU9LUlBFOU1RV1JDeS1wT3BfdHFHQzVaNlluWnVXVEFQeUdkalo0aTJ5Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">Former Meta Engineer Explains Wh…

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
item.description: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.

item.title: Bitcoin miners’ AI pivot faces investor scrutiny over insider sales
item.description: As AI-driven mining stocks retreat, investors are examining executive stock sales, governance and shareholder alignment across leading Bitcoin miners, according to Blocksbridge Consulting.

item.title: UK politicians mull permanent crypto donation ban in wake of Nigel Farage scandal
item.description: Labour lawmakers proposed a full moratorium on crypto donations in March, which some have sought be made permanent after millions of dollars in contributions were linked to Reform leader Nigel Farage.

item.title: Can Bitcoin hold $62K ahead of Friday’s $1.4 billion options expiry?
item.description: US 10-year Treasury yields nears dangerous level while major Deribit Bitcoin options expiry approaches.

item.title: MARA shares surge after 2 GW Texas infrastructure deal expands AI ambitions
item.description: The Bitcoin miner's shares climbed about 15% after announcing it's acquiring a Texas site with up to 2 GW of power capacity to expand its AI and digital infrastructure strategy.

item.title: Swift Readies Ledger for 24/7 Token Transfers—Though True Settlement Is Stuck on Old Rails
item.description: Swift’s pilot allows 17 global banks to transfer tokenized deposits on weekends, but ultimate settlement still relies on legacy systems.

item.title: I joined @kornelijalaura at the @xapobankapp Conference in London on July 1 for a fireside chat on Bitcoin as Digital Capital, the emergence of Digital Credit, and the path to Bitcoin-backed Digital Money. Fix the money, fix the world. $BTC 00:42 — Bitcoin be - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9HRF9FMFU5UjRiM3BwQktod0RDdUNCZjdZSThjRjd3SEZRQmhOZkJueEQ3eElPS09VNzU0S3NiZjUzQWR6eTZjaWhYekZSUERDUXB0UkpUN2NFaUE?oc=5" target="_blank">I joined @kornelijalaura at the @xapobankap…

item.title: Bitcoin traders reveal key levels as BTC price passes $63K after Trump Iran 'deal' comments
item.description: Bitcoin gained new upside targets for the daily close and beyond after US president Donald Trump said that Iran "wants to make a deal."

item.title: AI contracts, not bitcoin, now drive miner valuations, and Cipher and TeraWulf look cheap, says analyst
item.description: Compass Point analysts Michael Donovan and Ed Engel said markets are giving little credit to future AI data center pipelines despite billions of dollars in signed leases.

item.title: MARA Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Agrees to Acquire Massive Powered Texas Land Plot
item.description: MARA Holdings has agreed to purchase a sizable plot of land in Texas to power its Bitcoin mining and growing AI compute ambitions.

item.title: Labour MPs Push to Make UK Crypto Donation Ban Permanent
item.description: The lawmakers have tabled amendments to make the current moratorium permanent, as the fallout over Reform UK's funding widens.

item.title: Ethereum's newest nonprofit wants to become Wall Street's guide to crypto
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re digging into Ethereum Institutional, a new nonprofit aimed at educating financial institutions and banks about Ethereum.

item.title: New asset now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto. $SENT (Sentient) - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9pRTV1eVQ2NFBxX25WUF8yUnR6YUVHZE5aUV9TSzAxS3ltZk9pSk80aEVMeU1tYmpsSFNOdW9Ib1E1cDlfZzBPdkEyM05KTHQ1OUxPQ1lxTVZEaVV3eWF6LXFRMA?oc=5" target="_blank">New asset now available to trade…

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum dilemma: Bigger blocks or STARK proofs?
item.description: Dealing with large post quantum signatures slowing down Bitcoin can be solved with bigger blocks, or aggregating signatures using STARK proofs.

item.title: Aave rolls out vaults for yield-hungry fintech investors
item.description: Aave's new Stable Vaults product lets wallets, exchanges and payment apps offer yields on stablecoin deposits

item.title: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
item.description: MoonAgents lets users analyze markets and prepare crypto transactions through Telegram while keeping keys on their own devices.

item.title: Age verification is the surveillance nobody voted for
item.description: KOSA and Chat Control both retreated on their most-criticized measures this week, but both kept mandatory age verification, the quiet mechanism that turns anonymous browsing into identified browsing for all of us, argues Billions CEO Evin …

item.title: Hong Kong regulator orders new anti-phishing measures for crypto platforms
item.description: Hong Kong’s regulator has ordered crypto platforms and online brokers to meet newly issued phishing-resistant login requirements within the next 12 months.

item.title: Morning Minute: Paradigm Raises $1.2B Fund as Crypto’s Top VC Pushes Into AI
item.description: BNB Chain rebuilds itself for a world run by AI agents. BTC ETFs flows flip negative. And prediction markets face a new hurdle.

item.title: EU Set to Revise MiCA in 2027 to Cover Foreign Stablecoin Issuers
item.description: Trump's embrace of stablecoins is pushing Brussels to expand its crypto law to non-EU issuers and tokenized payments, EU diplomats say.

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: BitMine outlined a bullish Ethereum thesis, arguing that stablecoins, enterprise adoption, tokenization, and AI are expanding ETH’s total addressable market (TAM). - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBKdmh5QWs4YTM5SDF2NXdNQlluQTgwWlBROFluaUxsQXZJRXpuMXFMR09CbFd0M0NLR002aHBDc1NsWERDem5RempmY3pxM0s3THFjaWhRT01pSkttZ1I1NzZEUWU?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: BitMine outlined a b…

item.title: Solana Changelog: July 9, 2026
item.description: Agave, Firedancer, Superbank, Solana Go, and LiteSVM published new releases alongside validator, RPC, and tooling updates.

item.title: Over $7.2 billion have migrated from LayerZero to Chainlink CCIP as Mantle joins exodus
item.description: Migrations to Chainlink CCIP so far include Kelp and Lombard, both of which brought over $1 billion, as well as Solv Protocol, Virtuals, Re and Kraken’s tokenized assets.

item.title: Pricing houses in bitcoin exposes dollar's loss of value
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 9, 2026

item.title: Digital Credit is transparent because the principal market risk factor is Bitcoin, an observable, homogeneous asset. Analysts can assess BTC-related credit risk continuously, and investors can apply their own statistical models to inform valuation and trading de - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1HWndLYWVUYkU3Vk0tSzlOWkdtNjJNNTVuUzUwTDB0WUYwRUNfWGFHUWpFQ3hCVkpCSU5KaXd1M1hKdXZZajZ4aVg0WGxDc2oycmwtTkVSRTVTa3c?oc=5" target="_blank">Digital Credit is transparent because the p…

item.title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
item.description: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

item.title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
item.description: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

item.title: ICIJ: Circle Faces Criminal Complaint in Wisconsin Over Refusal to Recover Scam Victim Funds An ICIJ investigation reported that law enforcement authorities in Wisconsin and New York accused Circle of refusing to assist in freezing or recovering scam victi - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBnR1BNb2dLNl9Pc3NwYUJndjd3dHlOQURkenFvelZGaENWVXVKc3J5QjVsa2NFYVBLcVZ1YWxnNjMxQmdTc2lwQnZLTDRFQ1dKNDVLamZZcTh1VUdCUmFPdk1Mbw?oc=5" target="_blank">ICIJ: Circle Faces Criminal Comp…

item.title: Swift rolls out new blockchain ledger to bring 24/7 banking to 17 global giants
item.description: HSBC, UBS, Wells Fargo and Citi are among the 17 banks now preparing to pilot live transactions using tokenized digital assets on Swift’s new blockchain payments platform.

item.title: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
item.description: The lender's new US subsidiary, Connectia Trust, would issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin once it clears the regulator's final conditions.

item.title: Latin America’s biggest stock exchange now offers options on bitcoin, ether and solana futures
item.description: These options settle into underlying futures contracts rather than spot cryptoassets, involving no custody, transfer, or administration of tokens.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Q2 2026 Digital Asset Review
item.description: ETFs face record outflows

item.title: Crypto remains resilient in face of renewed Middle East tensions
item.description: BTC rose 1.2% to $63,000 and Nasdaq futures jumped 2.6% with markets seemingly unconcerned by U.S. airstrikes on Iran. Bitcoin is now up 9% since the end of June.

item.title: Revolut says USDT delisting is limited to EEA, Switzerland
item.description: Revolut said USDT support remains unchanged outside EEA and Switzerland as it winds down the stablecoin offering in selected European markets.

item.title: Singapore's Temasek investment fund says crypto is off the table, will focus on AI
item.description: The $400 billion wealth fund plans to expand AI holdings to 15% of its portfolio by 2031 from the current 6%.

item.title: Hyperliquid shows how onchain perps could challenge Wall Street: Pantera
item.description: Perpetual futures and Hyperliquid’s blockchain infrastructure are expanding into traditional asset classes with around-the-clock trading, according to Pantera Capital.
